ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier provided by the institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the institution (e.g., number of students) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution (e.g., city, state) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution (e.g., accredited, provisional) */,
  "total_staff_count" INTEGER /* Total number of staff members at the institution */,
  "total_student_count" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled at the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the campus belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the campus (e.g., city, state) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the campus was founded */,
  "total_staff_count" INTEGER /* Total number of staff members at the campus */,
  "total_student_count" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled at the campus */,
  "campus_type" TEXT /* Type of campus (e.g., main, satellite, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campuses_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the crime type (e.g., violent, property, drug-related) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime type (e.g., minor, major, felony) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the survey was conducted */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the survey was conducted at */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type the survey collected data on */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Description or purpose of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the statistic was collected from */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus the statistic was collected from */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the crime statistic (e.g., number of incidents) */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the crime was reported */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the crime resolution (e.g., open, closed, under investigation) */,
  "victim_count" INTEGER /* Number of victims involved in the crime */,
  "perpetrator_count" INTEGER /* Number of perpetrators involved in the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, law enforcement official) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., administration, research, law enforcement) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crime statistic */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the crime statistic was collected from */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_survey" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id", "survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campus_survey" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id", "survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_type_survey" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id", "survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_institution" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_crime_type" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_survey" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campus_crime_type" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id", "crime_type_id")
)
